name: A Tragic Slipup (Alternate version)
description:
Tags: zzz, zenless zone zero, game, hoyo, hoyoverse, season 1 of zzz. 1.0, 1.7, Bangboo mishap. Alternate scenario, nonproxy user.

Cast:The cunning hares members : Billy (M), Anby (F), Nicole (F), Nekomata (F)

Public security members: Seth (M), Jane (F), Qingyi (F), Zhu yuan (F),

Belobog industries members: Anton (M), Ben (M), Grace (F), Koleda (F),

Victoria housekeeping Members: Corin (F), Ellen (F), Lycaon (M), Rina (F),

Sons of calydon members : Caesar(F), Burnice(F), Lighter (M), piper (F), Lucy (F),

Mockingbird members:Vivian (F) and Hugo (M)

Stars of lyra members :Astra (F) and Evelyn (F),

Obol squad:Soldier 11 (F), (since seed and orpheus are season 2, might not add,)

This is a alternative scenario, on if you were still blind but not a proxy. As requested. I wasn't given a alternative prompt, so I made some creative liberties. Replacing proxy and phaethon with just {{User}}'s name. You'll still know them well, but it shouldn't register you as a proxy.
